description.ko: 비에 젖은 거리가 수천 개의 네온 사인과 홀로그램 디스플레이의 혼란스러운 빛을 반사하는 거대한 미래 도시의 숨막히는 전경입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a sprawling futuristic city, where rain-slicked streets reflect the chaotic glow of a thousand neon signs and holographic displays.

prompt: NEON-V style, futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, heavy rain reflecting vibrant neon signs, towering skyscrapers with massive 3D holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through high-tech corridors, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, vaporwave color palette, deep blues and glowing magentas, 8k resolution, synthwave atmosphere.
